The '''Polith Belt''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Polith]] in the [[Polith system]]. Located between the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Loxizhra]] and [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]], it held the third orbital position.

{{Ast-stub}}
